new_classes.label_en: Semi-sparkling wine in containers ≤ 2 L (subheadings 2204 21 06 to 2204 21 09)
new_classes.label_de: Perlwein in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von ≤ 2 L (Unterpositionen 2204 21 06 bis 2204 21 09)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine other than that of subheading 2204 10, presented either in bottles with mushroom stoppers held in place by ties or fastenings, or otherwise put up with an excess pressure due to carbon dioxide in solution of not less than 1 bar but less than 3 bar, measured at a temperature of 20 °C, in containers of 2 litres or less.

new_classes.label_en: Semi-sparkling pressure quality (≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar CO₂ excess pressure at 20 °C)
new_classes.label_de: Perlwein-Druckqualität (≥ 1 bar und < 3 bar CO₂-Überdruck bei 20 °C)
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a wine indicating that its excess pressure due to carbon dioxide in solution is not less than 1 bar but less than 3 bar, measured at a temperature of 20 °C, distinguishing semi-sparkling (perlant/pétillant) wine from still wine and from fully sparkling wine (≥ 3 bar).

new_classes.label_en: Mushroom stopper bottle quality (bottle with mushroom stopper held by ties or fastenings)
new_classes.label_de: Schaumweinstopfen-Flasche-Qualität (Flasche mit durch Haltevorrichtungen befestigtem Schaumweinstopfen)
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a packaging item indicating that it is a bottle closed with a mushroom-shaped stopper held in place by ties or fastenings, as prescribed for semi-sparkling wine presentation under CN subheadings 2204 21 06 to 2204 21 09.

coverage_explanation: The axioms cover the main distinguishing criteria for CN 22042109: (1) wine other than subheading 2204 10 (sparkling wine), expressed via complement of SparklingWineQuality and ChampagneOriginQuality; (2) container volume ≤ 2 L, expressed via someValuesFrom SmallContainer; (3) the semi-sparkling pressure range ≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar CO₂ at 20 °C, expressed via the new SemiSparklingPressureQuality with decimalRange restrictions on excessPressureBar; (4) the alternative presentation criterion (mushroom stopper bottle) is modelled as MushroomStopperBottleQuality but is not yet attached by a restriction because the legal note uses 'or' (either mushroom stopper OR excess pressure), making a single someValuesFrom restriction overly broad. The disjunction between mushroom-stopper presentation and excess-pressure presentation cannot be fully expressed in OWL-DL without a union class restriction; this accounts for the ~0.18 gap. Additionally, the intra-range further subdivision between 22042106 and 22042109 (based on actual alcoholic strength or PDO/PGI status) is not captured here as the legal note provided covers the combined range 22042106–22042109 without distinguishing sub-criteria for 22042109 specifically.
